title: Field
description: A form field wrapper component that includes labels and helper text.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: The Field component helps you easily add labels and helper text to input elements.

email.label: Email
email.helper: Enter the email address you'll use to log in

password.label: Password
password.helper: Enter a password with at least 8 characters

react.title: React Usage
react.description: How to use the Field component in React.

props.label: Field label
props.helper: Helper text or custom element (icon, etc.)
props.error: Error message (displayed in danger color, input border also changes to danger)

error.title: Error State
error.description: Using the error prop displays an error message in danger color and changes the inner input's border to danger. The same style is applied when validator validation fails.
error.sampleError: Please enter a valid email address

structure.title: Structure
structure.description: The Field component has the following structure:
structure.label: Label for the input field
structure.helper: Helper text for the input field (optional)

scss.title: SCSS Styling
scss.description: You can apply Field styles using podo-ui mixins.
